insight.headline: Merchant-owned delivery
insight.what_changed: The merchant-owned delivery profile APIs are deprecated for market-driven shipping. Shipping configuration is moving from legacy delivery profiles to Markets. The GraphQL Admin API will support market-driven shipping configuration starting in API version 2026-07.
insight.developer_impact: Developers need to update their integrations to use the new market-driven shipping configuration. They should use the Market API to configure shipping directly on a market. This change affects apps that use the delivery profile APIs. Developers should review their code and update it to use the new market-driven shipping configuration to avoid deprecation issues.
insight.merchant_impact: Merchants will be able to configure shipping directly on a market, which will help them support different shipping scenarios. This change will provide more flexibility in shipping configuration.
insight.why_it_matters: This change is important because it provides more flexibility in shipping configuration and allows merchants to support different shipping scenarios. It also aligns with Shopify's market-driven shipping model.

also_worth_knowing.text: Updated App Store Requirements: 1.3 Always Use Honest and Transparent Review Practices
Customer Account API Customer.lastIncompleteCheckout and Checkout types removed in 2026-10

updates.summary: The CLI has been updated to version 4.4.0 with various fixes and improvements, including the validation of GCS bundle upload status and the fixing of long URL wrapping in banner/alert footnotes.

updates.title: Updated App Store Requirements: 1.3 Always Use Honest and Transparent Review Practices
updates.summary: The Shopify App Store requirements policy 1.3 has been updated to clarify the use of honest and transparent review practices for all apps published to the Shopify App Store.

updates.title: Customer Account API Customer.lastIncompleteCheckout and Checkout types removed in 2026-10
updates.summary: The Customer.lastIncompleteCheckout field and the Checkout type subtree have been removed from the Customer Account API as of version 2026-10.

updates.title: Markets APIs now support MarketRegionSubdivision
updates.summary: The Markets APIs now support MarketRegionSubdivision, allowing apps to encounter Markets configured with country-subdivision regions.

updates.title: OrderDisplayFulfillmentStatus now returns FULFILLMENT_NOT_REQUIRED for orders with no items to fulfill
updates.summary: The OrderDisplayFulfillmentStatus enum now returns FULFILLMENT_NOT_REQUIRED for orders with no items to fulfill as of API version 2026-10.

updates.title: Shop Minis May June 2026 update
updates.summary: The Shop Minis May June 2026 update includes new features such as product variant intents and typed product variant intent hooks.

updates.title: Market-driven shipping now available in feature preview
updates.summary: Market-driven shipping is now available in feature preview, allowing merchants to attach shipping options directly to each market and vary rates by province or state.

updates.title: @shopify/mini-oxygen@4.2.0
updates.summary: The @shopify/mini-oxygen package has been updated to version 4.2.0, making the Oxygen Vite plugin self-sufficient and inferring a compatibility date from the resolved Hydrogen package.

updates.title: @shopify/cli-hydrogen@13.0.0
updates.summary: The @shopify/cli-hydrogen package has been updated to version 13.0.0, adding deploy flags and environment variables for configuring Oxygen's client assets directory and worker directory.

updates.title: Draft order deposit fields are now available in the GraphQL Admin API and Customer Account API
updates.summary: Draft order deposit fields are now available in the GraphQL Admin API and Customer Account API, allowing apps to set a deposit when creating or updating a draft order.

updates.title: Deprecation of cumulative marketing engagements
updates.summary: The isCumulative argument to the marketingEngagementCreate mutation is being deprecated, defaulting to false, and integrations should be updated to send non-cumulative engagements as needed.

updates.title: New `lineItem` field on the `GiftCard` object
updates.summary: A new lineItem field has been added to the GiftCard object in the GraphQL Admin API, representing the LineItem from the order that initiated the gift card's creation.

recap.headline: Shopify updates GraphQL Admin API, Hydrogen, and more

themes.title: API Updates
themes.detail: The GraphQL Admin API has been updated with new features such as market-driven shipping, draft order deposit fields, and discount application information for draft orders. Additionally, the Customer Account API has been updated with new fields such as Customer.lastIncompleteCheckout and Checkout types removal, and the deprecated discountedUnitPrice field on DraftOrderLineItem has been replaced wit…

themes.title: Hydrogen Updates
themes.detail: Hydrogen has been updated with new features such as the ability to deploy to Vercel, and the @shopify/mini-oxygen package has been updated to version 4.2.0. The @shopify/cli-hydrogen package has also been updated to version 13.0.0 with new deploy flags and environment variables.

themes.title: Deprecations and Removals
themes.detail: The isCumulative argument to the marketingEngagementCreate mutation has been deprecated, and the merchant-owned delivery profile APIs have been deprecated for market-driven shipping. The Customer.lastIncompleteCheckout field and Checkout types have been removed from the Customer Account API as of version 2026-10.

actions.text: Update your app to use the new market-driven shipping configuration
Replace the deprecated discountedUnitPrice field with approximateDiscountedUnitPrice
Update your integration to send non-cumulative marketing engagements
